intro: got questions? skelly's got mostly-useful answers.

items.question: When does Skelly stream?
items.answer: Tuesday 8 PM – 12 AM EST · Wednesday 4:30 PM – 10:30 PM EST · Friday 12 PM – 3 PM EST · Sunday 12 PM – 3 PM EST. Catch the live chaos on Twitch.

items.question: How do I become a Skellywag?
items.answer: Skellywags Club runs through YouTube channel memberships. Three tiers (Mateys $1.99 · Boatswain $4.99 · First Mate $9.99) — pick one, hit join on YouTube, you're in.

items.question: Where do I buy the merch?
items.answer: Right here on /shop — products pull live from the Fourthwall storefront. Click any item, checkout opens on Fourthwall (they handle payment + shipping).

items.question: Can I submit fan art?
items.answer: Yes. Drop it in the #fan-art channel on Discord or tag @itsmeskelly on Twitter. Skelly picks favorites and posts them to the Fan Art Wall on /community.

items.question: How do I contact Skelly?
items.answer: Easiest way is Discord — discord.gg/zpWv2cXxB9. He's also on YouTube, Twitch, Twitter, Instagram, and TikTok (links in nav and footer).

items.question: Is the merch official?
items.answer: Yes. If it's listed on skellywags.club/shop or skelly-xkh-shop.fourthwall.com, it's official. Anything sold elsewhere claiming to be Skelly merch — assume it isn't.

items.question: When does [thing] launch?
items.answer: Drop your email in any signup form on the site and we'll yell when chaos drops. Otherwise check Discord or follow @itsmeskelly for live announcements.
